content.situation: 你即将休假，主动向经理提出工作交接方案，以减轻他的负担。
content.speakerText: I'm planning to take time off soon, and I want to make sure everything runs smoothly in my absence.
content.speakerTextCn: 我计划不久后休假，我想确保在我离开期间一切都能顺利进行。
content.responseTemplate: I've ___ the key tasks to Emily and left detailed notes for each one.
content.hint: 表示‘移交’工作时，常用搭配是 hand over + 名词
content.knowledgePoint: 工作交接中的动词短语使用

content.situation: 你已完成交接准备，向经理确认是否需要进一步安排，同时表达希望他能安心休息。
content.speakerText: I've got all the documentation ready and trained the team on the main processes.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经准备好所有文件，并培训了团队掌握主要流程。
content.responseTemplate: You should take a real break — I'll ___ if anything comes up.
content.hint: 在承诺接手事务时，简洁有力的表达是 'I'll handle it'
content.knowledgePoint: 承诺承担责任的常用表达

content.situation: 经理感谢你的主动交接，你回应时既要表达谦逊，又要强调团队协作的重要性。
content.speakerText: I really appreciate how prepared you are — this takes so much pressure off me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢你这么有准备，这让我轻松了很多。
content.responseTemplate: It's no problem — it's just ___ to make sure the team stays on track.
content.hint: 强调职业责任感时，最自然且专业的表达是 'part of my responsibility'
content.knowledgePoint: 表达职业责任感的地道说法
